_comment: Synthetic SBI Card credit-card golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's test_cc_reader_characterization.py _SBI case; values captured from a live run of the web reader. Layout: DD Mon YY <details> <amount> C|D (C=Credit, D=Debit). card_last4 is null because the masked card 'XXXX XXXX XXXX XX61' shows only two trailing digits — a last-4 is never fabricated.
lines: 20 May 26 APPLE INDIA STORE MUMBAI IN 82,900.00 D
full_text:
GSTIN of SBI Card
Credit Card Number XXXX XXXX XXXX XX61
for Statement Period: 22 Apr 26 to 21 May 26
21 Apr 26 CARD CASHBACK CREDIT 643.00 C
20 May 26 APPLE INDIA STORE MUMBAI IN 82,900.00 D
